FROM Match m
JOIN Player p ON (m.away_player_1 = p.player_api_id

SELECT SUM(Match.away_team_goal)
FROM Match
WHERE Match.away_team_api_id IN (
    SELECT T.team_api_id
    FROM Match M
    JOIN Player P ON P.player_api_id IN (
        M.away_player_1, M.away_player_2, M.away_player_3, M.away_player_4, M.away_player_5,
        M.away_player_6, M.away_player_7, M.away_player_8, M.away_player_9, M.away_player_10, M.away_player_11
    )
    JOIN Team T ON T.team_api_id = M.home_team_api_id
    WHERE P.player_name IN ('Daan Smith', 'Filipe Ferreira')
);

);
